title: delegation.snapshot_created event payload (v1)
description: docs/canonical/TZ-00-domain-event-canon.md, section 20.11. Produced by epd2_delegation_service.events.delegation_snapshot_state_payload, used by build_delegation_snapshot_created_event. additionalProperties: false is a load-bearing identity-separation control: account_id, person_id, and identity_record_id are all forbidden and cannot appear on a payload that validates against this schema - resolved_weights maps an opaque delegate_actor_id (as a string key) to an integer weight only, never an identity.
